title: Text someone you haven't spoken to in 3+ months
flavour: NPC dialogue trees always start with a greeting. you are the NPC. initiate.

title: Send a voice note instead of a text
flavour: you have a voice. use it. full sentences preferred but not required.

title: React to 3 stories from people you rarely interact with
flavour: the algorithm buried them. unbury them. one emoji counts.

title: Compliment a stranger — in person, not online
flavour: IRL chat not unlocked? today it is. pick something real.

title: Ask someone how they're actually doing and wait for the real answer
flavour: not the 'good you?' speedrun. the full dialogue. let them load.

title: Send a meme to someone who would get it
flavour: targeted cultural transmission. this is how bonds form. send it.

title: Thank someone who did something small for you recently
flavour: the gratitude buffer is full. flush it.

title: Share something you're currently enjoying with one person
flavour: song, article, show, recipe — doesn't matter. share the thing.

title: Check in on a family member you haven't spoken to this week
flavour: they exist in real life, not just in your contacts list.

title: Reply to a message you've been leaving on read
flavour: the conversation didn't expire. they're still there. respond.
